ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Incauti Academy in Naples. For Carocci`s affiliation to the Incauti Academy see Pietro Carocci, Il Turchetto. Comedia, Napoli, Francesco Savio, 1644.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
